title: BMI Calculator - Body Mass Index
description: Free online BMI calculator. Calculate your Body Mass Index instantly. Find out if you're underweight, normal, overweight, or obese.
keywords: BMI calculator, body mass index, weight calculator, health calculator
intro: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) to check if your weight is healthy for your height.

faq.a: BMI (Body Mass Index) is a measure of body fat based on height and weight. It applies to adult men and women.

faq.q: What is a healthy BMI range?
faq.a: A BMI between 18.5 and 24.9 is considered healthy. Below 18.5 is underweight, 25-29.9 is overweight, and 30+ is obese.
BMI is a useful screening tool but doesn't directly measure body fat. Athletes may have high BMI due to muscle mass.
